content.question: If Hungary were to postpone selection (moving toward a single-structure comprehensive system through 8 or more grades), would the equity and performance effects observed in Poland's 1999 reform replicate in Hungary's demographic and social context?
content.reduction_path: Pilot implementation in selected regions with matched control comparisons on PISA and labor market outcomes; qualitative research on institutional adaptation barriers specific to Hungary; cross-national regression analysis controlling for initial segregation levels and education investment
